title: Dune
overview: Paul Atreides leads nomadic tribes in a revolt against the galactic emperor and his father's evil nemesis after the fall of House Atreides on the desert planet Arrakis.

title: Dune: Part Two
overview: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family, and tries to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

title: Blade Runner 2049
overview: A young blade runner discovers a long-buried secret that leads him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard, who has been missing for thirty years.

title: Arrival
overview: A linguist is recruited by the military to communicate with alien lifeforms after twelve mysterious spacecraft land around the world.

title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival as Earth's resources collapse.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure in which she alone can save existence by exploring other universes and connecting with the lives she could have led.

title: The Matrix
overview: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

title: Inception
overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a CEO.

title: Annihilation
overview: A biologist signs up for a dangerous, secret expedition into a mysterious zone where the laws of nature don't apply.

title: Ex Machina
overview: A young programmer is selected to participate in a ground-breaking experiment in synthetic intelligence by evaluating the human qualities of a highly advanced humanoid AI.

title: Edge of Tomorrow
overview: A soldier fighting aliens gets to relive the same day over and over again, the day restarting every time he dies.

title: The Fifth Element
overview: In the colorful future, a cab driver unwittingly becomes the central figure in the search for a legendary cosmic weapon to keep evil and Mr. Zorg at bay.

title: Spirited Away
overview: A young girl, Chihiro, becomes trapped in a strange new world of spirits and must work to free herself and her family from a witch who rules the realm.

title: Princess Mononoke
overview: On a journey to find the cure for a curse, a prince becomes embroiled in a struggle between a forest god and the humans consuming its resources.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
overview: A meek Hobbit and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the One Ring and the dark lord Sauron.

title: Pan's Labyrinth
overview: Living with her tyrannical stepfather in a new home with her pregnant mother, a lonely young girl explores a mysterious labyrinth tended to by a magical faun.

title: Children of Men
overview: In a near future where humans can no longer reproduce, a disillusioned bureaucrat becomes the unlikely champion in the fight for the survival of mankind.

title: Gravity
overview: Dr. Ryan Stone and veteran astronaut Matt Kowalski are stranded in space after the destruction of their shuttle, forced to fight for survival.

title: The Martian
overview: An astronaut becomes stranded on Mars after his team assume him dead, and must rely on his ingenuity to find a way to survive and signal Earth.

title: District 9
overview: An extraterrestrial race forced to live in slum-like conditions on Earth suddenly finds a kindred spirit in a government agent exposed to their biotechnology.

title: Looper
overview: In a future where time travel is outlawed and used only by criminal organizations, a hired gun confronts a target who turns out to be his future self.

title: Prisoners of the Vault
overview: A data archivist discovers a hidden quantum vault beneath the city that stores the memories of everyone who has ever lived, and someone wants it erased.

title: The Tomorrow War
overview: A family man is drafted to fight in a future war where the fate of humanity relies on his ability to confront a deadly alien species.

title: Ad Astra
overview: An astronaut travels to the outer edges of the solar system to find his missing father and unravel a mystery that threatens the survival of our planet.
